name: ci
tagline: Monitors GitHub Actions CI runs and automatically replicates failing tests/lint locally for fast triage.
verdict: Concrete commands and deterministic run discovery make this usable, but it has no scope exclusions, no failure handling for its own tool chain (node script, gh, npm), no declared prerequisites, and no versioning signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / exclusion guidance anywhere in description or body.
Duplicate '### 1.' heading used for both 'CI Replicate' and 'CI Status' workflows (lines 26, 38).
'Structured Failure Report' referenced repeatedly but its fields/sections are never defined.
